notes: The 211 packaged frontend smoke was rechecked for runtime subject cbbfaff and remains blocked_environment with docker_registry_proxy_unreachable and base_image_pull_failed.

This is reviewed blocker evidence only, not release acceptance. It records that the source files and compose overlay are present, but the Docker-capable host cannot resolve docker/dockerfile:1.7 build frontend metadata and still requires node:22-alpine and nginx:1.27-alpine before runtime smoke can run.
The evidence intentionally redacts the registry proxy endpoint, raw daemon failure text, host paths, env-file values, credentials, and secret-like runtime material.
Source revision, OCI revision, runtime-subject, and source_revision alias labels point to cbbfaff. The external env-file compose label remains an open deployment-layout follow-up.
